nasb.text: Then the Lord will go forth and fight against those nations, as when He fights on a day of battle.

esv.text: Then the Lord will go out and fight against those nations as when he fights on a day of battle.

cnv.text: 那時，耶和華要出去，與那些國家作戰，像他以前在戰爭的日子作戰一樣。

ccb.text: 那时，耶和华必出来与列国争战，像从前争战的日子一样。
